summary: CapyMatch Kanban D&D Refinement Testing - All 10 features verified. CRITICAL: All teal accent colors successfully removed from drag/drop feedback. Replaced with neutral colors: white halo shadow, neutral borders, gradient column background, neutral settle animation. Verified: scale(1.04) rotate(1deg), white halo (rgba(255,255,255,0.5)), neutral shadows (rgba(0,0,0,...)), 220ms timing, 350ms settle, header unity color boosts, top bar 0.5→0.85 opacity.
critical_code_review_comments: KanbanCard composedTransform correctly uses scale(1.04) rotate(1deg) - changed from 1.5deg to 1deg
dragShadow correctly uses white halo: '0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.5), 0 28px 52px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
Card border during drag correctly uses neutral rgba(0,0,0,0.06) - NO teal
borderLeft correctly set to undefined during drag (no teal accent during drag)
Lane isDraggingOver correctly uses gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.004) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.016) 100%)
Lane border correctly transparent (no teal border): '1px solid transparent'
Lane inset shadow correctly neutral: 'inset 0 1px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.025)'
Lane transform correctly scales to 1.008 on isDraggingOver
Header label color boosts to var(--cm-text, #0f172a) on isDraggingOver
Header count weight boosts to 700 and color to var(--cm-text-2, #475569) on isDraggingOver
Top bar default opacity 0.5, boosts to 0.85 with soft glow on isDraggingOver
Settle animation 350ms with NEUTRAL shadows - NO teal glow
pipeline-motion.css pm-drop-settle keyframe uses neutral rgba(0,0,0,...) shadows
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data. Note: Stanford moved from Added→Outreach during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban D&D refinement fully verified. KEY CHANGE: All teal accent colors removed from drag/drop/settle - replaced with neutral colors. Verified values: scale(1.04) rotate(1deg), white halo shadow, neutral border rgba(0,0,0,0.06), gradient column bg, inset shadow 24px 0.025 opacity, scale(1.008), 220ms transitions, 350ms settle, header color boosts, top bar 0.5→0.85 opacity. Card positions after test: Added(0), Outreach(4: Stanford, U of Florida, Creighton, TEST_Dup), Talking(3: Emory, UCLA, Florida Atlantic), Visit(0), Offered(0).
